data.title: FoodCycler expands food waste programs from 200+ Canadian municipalities to US communities, modernizing habits.
data.description: In an effort to revolutionize food waste management practices, FoodCycler is extending its programs to a wide range of sectors including municipalities, schools, multi-residential buildings, and waste haulers. The initiative, which originally operated in over 200 Canadian municipalities, is now branching out into the United States. The company aims to assist communities in transitioning away from obsolete food waste methods. This development was announced in Ottawa, ON on September 24, 2025.

data.title: The Court of Master Sommeliers, Americas launches SommBIZ, the first online beverage business course for hospitality leaders.
data.description: In Santa Barbara, California on September 24, 2025, The Court of Master Sommeliers, Americas™ revealed the introduction of SommBIZ™. This innovative online beverage business course, crafted by Master Sommeliers, aims to assist hospitality leaders in nurturing their staff into adept business strategists. This is the industry's pioneering initiative in this domain.

data.title: Bitcoin is at $113,000, analysts uncertain. Kevin sees bullish signs post dip to $110,600. Rising retail and whale inflows suggest upward direction.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently priced slightly above $113,000, prompting mixed opinions among analysts about its future trajectory. Notably, analyst Kevin highlighted that Bitcoin recently fell to around $110,600, leading to long liquidations and creating a bullish divergence. Increased interest from both retail investors and whales, along with positive signals from the 4-hour relative strength index, suggest a potential upward trend. Furthermore, a 4-hour closing price surpassing the 200-day simple moving average... More details can be found on the Benzinga website.

data.title: NLP in Education Market reaches USD 3.5 billion by 2033, with a 12.8% CAGR growth, driven by demand for personalized learning and AI tools.
data.description: The NLP sector in the education industry is experiencing significant expansion due to increasing interest in customized learning, smart tutoring systems, and AI-based evaluation tools. Natural Language Processing technology facilitates adaptive educational platforms, automated grading systems, and instant language translation services. This growth is driven by the increasing demand for personalized education solutions, with the market expected to reach significant figures in the coming years.

data.title: Solana's PWEASE coin surged following meme by VP JD Vance, propelling the seven-month-old meme coin on Wednesday.
data.description: The value of the Solana-based meme cryptocurrency, PWEASE, experienced a significant surge on Wednesday following a post by U.S. Vice President JD Vance featuring the meme. The spike occurred when the coin was just seven months old.
JPMorgan Asset Management Holdings Inc. discloses 5% stake in Umicore in transparency notification.
Bureau Veritas closes EUR 700M bond sale maturing in October 2033.

data.title: VAYK changes name to "Great Estate Blockchains Inc" after reviving cryptocurrency strategy. OTCPink: VAYK.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, Vaycaychella, Inc. (OTC Pink: VAYK) revealed their plan to rebrand as "Great Estate Blockchains, Inc." The name change was prompted by a renewed focus on their cryptocurrency initiative geared towards capitalizing on market opportunities.

data.title: Vitamin Angels and Takeda team up to address climate and health crisis in Indonesia, aiming to train 1M workers and help vulnerable populations.
data.description: A new initiative has been launched in New York on September 24, 2025, by Vitamin Angels. The five-year program aims to train approximately one million health workers and provide climate-responsive nutrition to millions of women and children who are among the most nutritionally vulnerable populations.

data.title: Dollar Bank expands wealth management program to 28 Northeast Ohio locations with Cetera, enhancing client services.
data.description: A 170-year-old community bank in Cleveland has improved its client experience by extending access to financial advisors and comprehensive wealth management services. On September 24, 2025, Dollar Bank shared news of its expansion of the Dollar Investment Services wealth management program.

data.title: Field to Market releases its 2025 Sustainability Commitments Report during U.S. Climate Week, the fourth one so far.
data.description: In the capital city of Washington on September 24, 2025, the nonprofit organization Field to Market: The Alliance for Sustainable Agriculture unveiled its fourth Sustainability Commitments Report. This coincided with enhancements made to its Sustainability Commitments Hub, as part of efforts to observe Climate Week. The report provides insights into the progress made by industry stakeholders in promoting sustainable agriculture practices. The updated hub offers an interactive platform for sharing information and resources related to sustainability commitments. This initiative showcases the commitment of the organization and its partners towards enhancing environmental stewardship in the agricultural sector.
Summary of weekly stock buyback program: Details of recent transactions.

data.title: Research report analyzes Tesla's digital transformation strategy by 2025, detailing accelerators, incubators, and innovation programs.
data.description: A recent analysis on Tesla Inc. offers a detailed overview of the company's technological endeavors up to 2025. Tesla, a prominent player in the automotive and energy sectors, specializes in electric vehicle manufacturing, energy generation, and storage solutions. The report delves into Tesla's digital transformation strategies, innovation projects, and technology ventures. This business insights report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, providing valuable information on Tesla's tech landscape and future direction.

data.title: Promise Robotics partners with Mattamy Homes to scale up prefabricated homebuilding in a multi-year deal.
data.description: Calgary, Alberta - On September 24, 2025, Promise Robotics™ revealed a significant development in the form of a multi-year strategic commercial collaboration with the Alberta Division of Mattamy Homes, recognized as the largest family-owned homebuilder in North America. This partnership signifies a pivotal moment in the industry as two leading entities unite their expertise to advance in AI and robotics technology.

data.title: Midwest Orthopaedics at Rush becomes official orthopedic provider for Sure Shot Pickleball, top program in Illinois.
data.description: In Chicago on September 24, 2025, Midwest Orthopaedics at Rush (MOR), a leading orthopedic program in Illinois, announced its expansion to cater to the increasing pickleball community. MOR, which is known for being the top orthopedic program in the state, will now serve as the official orthopedic provider for Sure Shot Pickleball members. This move is expected to provide specialized care and support for the growing number of pickleball enthusiasts.

data.title: Visa and Pismo partner to create BUUT's Gen Z card with ABN AMRO in 10 days, a fast fintech collaboration.
data.description: In a quick and dynamic move within the fintech realm, a novel proposal arose with rapidity on Pismo's cloud-native platform. The vibrant hub of Amsterdam witnessed this development on September 24, 2025. Visa and Pismo joined forces with ABN AMRO to fuel BUUT's competitive card designed for Gen Z users. Astonishingly, BUUT's debit card was conceived in a mere span of 10...

data.title: iCIMS hosting free virtual event iCIMS Next: AI Spotlight on Nov. 13 in Holmdel, NJ with CEU credits available.
data.description: Join iCIMS Next: AI Spotlight on November 13 to receive CEU credits. The event is hosted by iCIMS, a top talent acquisition software company based in Holmdel, N.J. The free virtual customer event will feature insights into AI technology.

data.title: ORR Protection receives VESDA Precision Detection Partner Award from NOTIFIER by Honeywell at Fire Partner Conference.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky on September 24, 2025, ORR Protection, a leading provider of essential fire protection solutions, received the VESDA® Precision Detection Partner Award from NOTIFIER by Honeywell at the Honeywell Fire Partner Conference from September 14-19.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor from South Lake Tahoe develops 4-in-1 pet product (SLT-350) inspired by late Min-Pin, Taz.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 24, 2025, an inventor from South Lake Tahoe, Calif., revealed their inspiration came from the energetic spirit of their late pet Taz, a Min-Pin. The inventor aimed to provide freedom and security for pets in bustling recreational areas like beaches, campgrounds, and parks. This led to the creation of a new product designed to address these needs.

data.title: Grays Peak Capital launches $500M Private Credit Fund II for government and defense sector in North America.
data.description: A global investment firm, Grays Peak Capital (GPC), from New York, has revealed the initiation of its second fund, named Grays Peak Private Credit II (GPPC GovCon). This private credit vehicle aims to offer strategic capital to the government and defense sector in North America. The fund targets investing in this ecosystem to support its growth.
